author: draganrakita
content:
> That increases the complexity at the authorization list processing side, where you can stop executing mid processing. That needs a separate EIP for sure.

It is not different from what is done inside frame, so idea is to unify all of it. I dont know about besu but `apply eip7702` impl in revm is one function. EIP-2780 already introduces this mechanism and it changes how gas is calculated so it feel like good place to change this EIP to reflect this.

> You still did not mention what happens at the builder during tx selection. For the cases where the user has gas for only part of the authorization processing. It needs to execute the payload. This is a regression in UX for builders trying to check what txs to include.

I didn't fully understand you here what kind of regression are you talking about, this tx is still going to be included, check for intrinsic gas is enough to prove tx is valid.
